post.hook:
I got a call at 2 AM from a homeowner in tears.

Her property manager had missed a slow leak for 5 months.

$47,000 in damage. Mold in every wall. Insurance denied the claim.

That call changed everything.
post.body:
I spent the next 18 months building something that would never let that happen again.

Not a bigger team. Not more clipboards. Not more 'scheduled visits.'

I built a fleet of 383 autonomous AI agents.

They inspect every property weekly across 360 data points.
They detect anomalies in hours — not months.
They alert our team before a small problem becomes a $47K disaster.

Today, Coastal Key protects millions in Treasure Coast real estate.

Not because we're bigger than other property managers.
Because we built something they can't copy.
post.cta:
If your property sits vacant for even one month a year, you deserve better than a clipboard.

DM 'PROTECT' and I'll personally review your property's risk profile.

No pitch. No pressure. Just the truth about what your home needs while you're away.

alternativeHooks:
383 AI agents.
12 operational divisions.
1 mission: your property never becomes a horror story.

Here's why I built the most advanced property management fleet in Florida.

Your property manager visits twice a month.

Our AI checks your property 360 ways — every single week.

Here's what that difference actually looks like in real dollars.

The most expensive sentence in property management:

'We didn't notice it during the last inspection.'

I built Coastal Key to make sure no one ever says that to you.
bestPostingTime: Tuesday or Thursday, 7:15 AM EST — catches Northeast commuters scrolling and Florida early risers
engagementDrivers: Opening with emotion ($47K disaster) creates immediate investment in the story
Specific numbers (383 agents, 360 data points) build credibility without sounding like a pitch
The CTA ('DM PROTECT') is low-friction, personal, and creates a direct conversation
The story arc (problem → frustration → building something new → result) mirrors the hero's journey audiences instinctively follow
